calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2005 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2005 Continued To Jul-29-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Nelson Meeks, Esq. for Plaintiff: Raul Gallegos, present with Spanish Interpreter: Arleen Raymundo.
Plaintiff and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Juan Ramon Lopez dba Agencia Aduana Lopez.
Matter is submitted and under submission, proposed Judgment received in court.
Judgment to be awarded after the Court reviews the Plaintiff's Statement of Damages, received in court.
June 10, 2005
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $30,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,989.04
Costs $292.50, for a total of $32,281.54
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
